notes: HAR-299 runtime-backed coverage for product- and variant-centric selling-plan membership roots. The referenced selling-plan group lifecycle capture supplies Shopify membership payload, unknown-id userError, and downstream product/ProductVariant read evidence; the runtime test executes each product/productVariant join and leave root directly and checks root-specific payloads plus product, variant, and group membership read-after-write effects. The generic parity runner does not replay this multi-root membership flow as a single captured proxy request.
